title: Cull suggestion — which photos to drop when an album overruns its song, and why
description: Written by scripts/suggestCull.mjs. A REVIEWABLE proposal, never an action: each dropped photo carries the reason it was chosen, and locked photos (must-use, bookends, duplicate-group representatives) are listed so a person can see nothing important was on the block. Applying the cull is a separate consented step.

keep.description: How many photos this suggestion keeps.

shortfall.description: Present only when the target could not be reached without dropping a locked photo.

drop.description: Photos proposed for removal, worst-first (near-duplicates ahead of low-quality).

locked.description: Photos that were held back from the cull, each with why.
